features.vestingText: A participant is 100% vested after five years of credited service.
features.rothText: Participants may also elect to make Roth and after-tax contributions.
features.autoEscalateText: Unless elected otherwise by the participant, deferrals are automatically increased annually by 1%, up to a maximum auto-deferral of 10%.
features.eligibilityText: Eligibility – Employees of the Company, other than collective bargaining employees, nonresident aliens, temporary contract employees, student interns, and intermittent contract employees are eligible to participate in the Plan upon hire.
features.loansText: Notes receivable from participants – Participants may borrow from their accounts a minimum of $1,000 up to a maximum equal to the lesser of $30,000 or 50% of their vested account balance.
features.autoEnrollText: Automatically enrolled participants have their deferral rate set at 5% of eligible compensation and their contributions invested in a designated fund until elected otherwise by the participant.
